DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF THE REALREAL, INC.'S OMNIBUS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 4, 2015 AT 10:00 A.M. TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DOUGLAS ROBBINS, 1 POST STREET, SUITE 800, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94104, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY BRIEF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2015 10:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF THE REALREAL, INC.'S OMNIBUS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE REAL REAL'S WRITTEN OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE IN OPPOSITION TO ITS OMNIBUS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. (ORDER RE OBJECTIONS SIGNED.) JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF THE REALREAL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And For Sanctions is off calendar. This case has been dismissed in its entirety as of April 16, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

The Realreal Inc.S Omnibus Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ezekiel L. Rauscher, Esq. of Sidley Austin LLP, Tel. 415.772.7423, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jack G. Cairl, Esq. of Isaacman Kaufman & Painter, Tel. 310.881.6800, for defendant and opposing party.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. After argument, the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF THE REALREAL, INC.'s Omnibus Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. The Real Real's Written Objections to Evidence in Opposition to its Omnibus Motion to Compel Further Responses is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312. (Order re objections signed.) Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

The Realreal Inc.S Omnibus Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Continued To Mar-04-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE REALREAL, INC.'S Omnibus Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is continued to March 4, 2015 at 10:00 a.m. to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the Opposition papers to Douglas Robbins, 1 Post Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, California 94104, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 27, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply brief. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
